VIP segment
Top 7% of customers drive 34% of revenue
VIPs hold 3× the AOV and a 78% repeat rate. Four are now drifting At Risk — protect them before the relationship cools.
At risk
Customers slipping past their reorder window
$380K of committed revenue is exposed across the at-risk and going-cold segments. Win-back is estimated to recover $95K on historical conversion.
New customers

The post-purchase flow before day 45 is the highest-leverage moment to convert a first order into a repeat relationship.

Release

This is the one place a single order appears — inside a person’s record, read as behavior, not bookkeeping. The global order list lives in Operations and Finance. Here, every customer is ranked not by what they spent, but by health and margin — so a high-spend, high-return account reads as the liability it is.

Ask Magellan anything…
